title: pandanus reflexus
intro: Pandanus reflexus, also known as Pandan or Screw Pine, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its distinctive, spiral leaves and edible fruit. The plant has been utilized for centuries in traditional medicine, exhibiting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Pandanus reflexus offer health benefits such as improved digestion, relief from respiratory issues, and antioxidant-rich support for the immune system. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and provide a natural remedy for various health concerns.
